name: Clacton Pier
description: Clacton Pier is a pier located in the seaside resort town of Clacton-on-Sea in England.  It was named Pier of the Year in 2020 by the National Piers Society.  The pier hosts rides, ten-pin bowling, arcades, 4D dinosaur exhibit, golf and a soft-play centre – as well as numerous food, drink and retail outlets.
